# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The current supported version is:

- CloudGuardian AI v2.0

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in CloudGuardian AI, please open a GitHub issue with a clear description of the problem.

Please include:

- What the vulnerability is
- Where it was found
- Steps to reproduce it
- Suggested fix, if possible

Security issues will be reviewed and addressed in future releases.

Thank you for helping improve CloudGuardian AI.
